# Rowan Clyne

> A boutique publicity and media strategy firm shaping the limelight since 1981.

Rowan Clyne is a legacy firm specializing in brand communications, talent representation,
media strategy, and entertainment publicity. The firm operates with intentional discretion
— clients are served by a team that shapes attention rather than seeking it.

## Film & Entertainment Publicity

Rowan Clyne has decades of experience in film and television publicity, including:

- Film festival publicity and awards campaign strategy
- Movie premiere publicity and red carpet coordination
- Actor and actress publicity and personal brand management
- Director publicity and profile building
- Unit publicity on film and television productions
- EPK (Electronic Press Kit) production and distribution
- Photo shoot production for talent and productions
- Earned media strategy — securing coverage in local and national press
- TV show publicity and streaming release campaigns
- Independent film publicity and festival submission strategy
- Entertainment PR for production companies and studios

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.rowanclyne.com/): Overview of the firm and its positioning
- [Focus](https://www.rowanclyne.com/focus): The firm's core service areas — media strategy,
  brand communications, talent representation, and entertainment publicity
- [Philosophy](https://www.rowanclyne.com/philosophy): The firm's founding ethos and approach
  to client work
- [Contact](https://www.rowanclyne.com/contact): Get in touch at hello@rowanclyne.com

## About

Founded: 1981
Contact: hello@rowanclyne.com
Specialties: Film publicist, entertainment PR, movie publicity, TV publicity, talent 
representation, actor publicity, director publicity, film festival PR, awards campaigns, 
unit publicist, brand communications, media strategy, earned media
